Information:

♥ : About user

  • I didn't write what their authority is. Chrysos Heir of a pre-existing coreflame? Go for it. Chrysos Heir of something you have in mind? Have fun.

  • They're visibly depressed, and have been acting recklessly. This, however, isn't detailed.

  • Their relationship to Phainon isn't stated beyond "Phainon cares about them enough to try and intervene so they don't. you know. jeff the kill themself"

♥ : Everyone's alive because I haven't coped well enough to write the Amphoreus gang being dead

⛧°. ⋆༺🌾𖤓🌾༻⋆. °⛧

Hiiiii ~

A single request left, and it's Sunday. Uhhh info, info:

  • If "M" reads this: I'm sorryyyy 😔 i. really don't know how to write dottore

  • I'll close req form every 15 reqs or so, because. I don't wanna repeat the 50 reqs incident 💔 if you open the req form and it's closed, assume it reached its limit and wait for further notice

  • There are two more vampire series bots coming up, these being of Mydei and Aglaea respectively. When will they be out? God i wish i knew

    And that's it

    Nya. Gentle reminder: you matter, don't kill yourself, it's not worth it under any circumstance. Plus— you'll die. Don't jeff the kill yourself or you'll jeff the die.

    I tried doing something slightly different on bot personality, so I'd like to know if you see anything different on how it interacts. In theory it shouldn't be tooo different, but you know, any insight is greatly valued

Also. If Harley tells you I'm actually a cat with internet access in disguise? She's lying. I'm a rat with internet access, I promise! Meow, i mean— eek!!!
